code: const API_BASE=process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE||'http://127.0.0.1:8000';export async function analyzePatient(payload){const response=await fetch(`${API_BASE}/analyze`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(payload)});let data;try{data=await response.json();}catch{throw new Error('Invalid response from backend.');}if(!response.ok){const message=data.detail||data.message||'Unable to complete analysis request.';throw new Error(message);}return data;}
